decisions.name: Does_Funding_Opportunity_Have_Action_Plans
decisions.label: Does Funding Opportunity Have Action Plans

recordCreates.description: Creates an Budget based on Budget Template of the Funding Opportunity
recordCreates.name: Create_Budget_Name_Framework
recordCreates.label: Create Budget Name Framework

recordCreates.description:
Creates an action plan that’s associated with the individual application. The action plan then generates the associated individual application tasks. The action plan’s required fields are populated based on information on the funding opportunity’s related action plan template.
Make sure that the site user has access to action plan templates and application stage definitions.
recordCreates.name: CreateActionPlan
recordCreates.label: Create Action Plan

recordCreates.description:
Creates an individual application record related to the funding opportunity for this applicant. The individual application is populated with the applicant’s contact and account information and sets the application status to In Progress.
Important: add RecordTypeID as a field and set it to the Grantmaking record type that your admin set up in your org.
recordCreates.name: CreateIndividualApplication
recordCreates.label: Create Individual Application

recordLookups.description:
Gets the action plan template version associated with the funding opportunity with a status of Final. Based on the action plan template, the flow creates an action plan for this application.
Add Get elements for other records to help to calculate values and populate the individual application for the applicant.
recordLookups.name: GetActionPlanTemplateVersion
recordLookups.label: Get Action Plan Template Version

recordLookups.description:
Gets the funding opportunity record that matches the recordId that's passed into the flow.
Add a Decision element to handle when a funding opportunity is missing the lookup to action plan template version.
recordLookups.name: GetFundingOpportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Funding Opportunity

recordLookups.description:
Gets the site user's contact ID, if they have one. The flow later enters details related to this contact for Individual application. The element doesn't work for CRM users.
Add Get elements for other records to help populate the individual application for the applicant.
recordLookups.name: GetSiteUserContact
recordLookups.label: Get Site User Contact

fields.name: CreateIndividualApplicationDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Issue trying to create individual application record step

fields.name: EligibilityAssessment
fields.fieldText: Eligibility Check (Pre-Screening)

fields.name: EligibilityTest
fields.fieldText: Thank you for your interest in {!GetFundingOpportunity.Name}. Please complete all the questions below in order to determine your eligibility to apply.

fields.name: Do_you_meet_the_stated_organizational_or_individual_applicant_requirements_for_t
fields.fieldText: Do you meet the stated organizational or individual applicant requirements for this program?

fields.name: Does_your_organization_have_a_non_discrimination_policy_that_ensures_it_does_not
fields.fieldText: Does your organization have a non-discrimination policy that ensures it does not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, color, sex, religion, age, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, or disability?

fields.name: Do_you_have_any_active_awards_with_open_or_unresolved_compliance_notices
fields.fieldText: Do you have any active awards with open or unresolved compliance notices?

fields.name: eligibilityAssessmentFailText
fields.fieldText:
Thank you for exploring the funding opportunity for {!GetFundingOpportunity.Name}. Based on your responses to the eligibility quiz, you do not currently qualify for funding for this opportunity. Please click here to find out more about what kinds of requests that we do not generally support.


Please browse our other active funding opportunities.


Click here to return to the home page.

fields.name: DisplayError
fields.fieldText: Get Site User Contact Step Error

fields.name: ErrorScreenApplyforFundingOppty
fields.fieldText: Something went wrong with the Apply for Funding Opportunity Step

screens.description:
This screen has a link to the applicant’s individual application that was created by this flow.
Consider replacing this link with a local action that instead takes the applicant directly to the new individual application.
screens.name: GoToIndividualApplicationRecord
screens.label: Go to Individual Application Record

fields.name: CongratsApplicationStarted
fields.fieldText: Congratulations! You've taken the first steps towards submitting your application for the {!GetFundingOpportunity.Name}

fields.name: ApplicationGuidanceHeaderSuccess
fields.fieldText: Application Guidance & Next Step:

fields.name: FormFrameworkGuidance
fields.fieldText:
Form Framework:

To make your application process as smooth as possible, we’ve organized your form into clear, guided sections. Based on the {!GetFundingOpportunity.ActionPlanTemplate.Name} requirements, you'll only see the steps and questions specifically needed for this grant.

fields.name: BudgetManagementContext
fields.fieldText:
Budget Management:

This program requires budget alignment with specific {!GetFundingOpportunity.BudgetTemplate.Name} standards. We’ve built these requirements directly into your application page to ensure your budget categories and periods meet all eligibility guidelines.

fields.name: DemoNoteforSEs
fields.fieldText: To finish and submit, click on Application home page to proceed.

screens.description:
Displays an error to the flow user.
This generic error is used throughout the flow template. Add other Decision elements or Error screens to detail specific failure reasons, ways to fix the issues, or how to contact your organization for help.
Keep in mind the pause button is hidden on this screen. When something goes wrong, the user needs to restart the flow from the beginning.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorCreateIndividualApplicationOrActionPlan
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: CreateIndividualApplicationOrActionPlanErrorDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Final Step, Something went wrong and we can’t create your application. Try applying again or contact us for help.

screens.description:
Prompts the flow user to confirm or enter the account that’s applying for funding. Add additional fields for the individual application as needed.
This is the last screen before the user is redirected to the individual application. Consider adding elements to configure the new application record before the user is sent to the application. For example, add flow elements for Compliant Data Sharing participant records so the applicant can collaborate with others.
Keep in mind the pause button is hidden on this screen. When something goes wrong, the user needs to restart the flow from the beginning.
screens.name: ScreenEnterOrConfirmAccount
screens.label: Enter or Confirm Account

fields.name: Funding_Opp_Context
fields.fieldText: Grant you are applying for: {!GetFundingOpportunity.Name}

fields.name: Verify_Organization_Contact_Information
fields.fieldText: Step 1: Verify (or search) Your Organization and Primary Applicant Contact Information

fields.name: Define_Application_Information
fields.fieldText: Step 2: Accept/Modify Your Unique Application Name

fields.name: DisplayText2
fields.fieldText: Tip: Most applicants name their application related to their proposed project or based on their specific program / location (e.g., 'FY28 Community Center Project - North District').

fields.name: Application_Name_Input
fields.fieldText: Give your Application a Name
fields.helpText: You can always update this later before submitting your application.

textTemplates.description: This hyperlink sends users to their new individual application.
textTemplates.name: HyperlinkToIndividualApplication
textTemplates.text: Go to your application.

variables.description: Stores the ID of the funding opportunity record passed into the flow.
variables.name: recordId
